title: whois connector configuration
description: ACTIVE registration lookup (whois). The query target is supplied per-run via the authorized scope, not the stored config; this config only carries optional instance-level limits.

dataset.title: Dataset
dataset.description: Optional dataset label used in the provenance source_id.

timeout.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Optional hard wall-clock bound on the whois subprocess, in seconds.
